﻿PLF OWNER SPOTLIGHT

Kara Andretta
Kara had plenty of followers in the cake decorating niche but never really sold them anything. With her first launch, she not only sold like crazy… she made enough to help buy a new family home.

Cinnamon & Jason Miles
Before PLF, Cinnamon and Jason had a total of 22 students enroll in their online design academy. Since discovering (and using) PLF, they’ve racked up millions of downloads on their products and courses.

Tanya Targett
Speaker/trainer and single mom Tanya was burned out from constant travel. With PLF, she’s now reaching more people (and generating more income) in a day than she used to in four months… and she does it all from home.


Troy Dean
Troy already had a successful membership site, but his growth was flat. Four launches later, Troy’s list has doubled and his business has grown to seven figures in revenue.


Barry Friedman
Barry was a master juggler, putting on shows all over the country. He even performed at the White House. But after a freak mountain bike accident brought his performing days to a screeching halt, Barry had to find a new way to make a living.


Shelley Brander
Shelley walked away from a successful branding business to focus on her passion – knitting. With just two PLF launches, she generated more than $200,000 from her online knitting club and is on track to do even better.

Gaby Gonzalez & Luis Carlos Flores
Gaby & Luis wanted to help Latin American parents improve their relationships with their kids, but had trouble reaching their audience. Their first PLF launch brought more revenue than all their previous efforts combined… and they’ve changed thousands of lives.
